reason: shadcn/ui patterns, named exports, cn() usage, dark mode conventions — must follow for all new components
URL state via useSearchParams, no global state library — search/sort/filter should use URL params, not useState
File placement conventions — new components go in components/, pages stay in pages/
TypeScript interface patterns for API params and response types — search/sort params need proper typing
Raw SQL patterns, parameterized queries, connection handling — needed for adding search LIKE and sort params to fetchTasks
HTTPException patterns, validation — search/sort params need proper error handling at API boundary
Data flow across backend→frontend boundaries — search/sort params span both layers, need consistent contracts
Task requirements and decisions — authoritative source for what to implement
